hook: Dating gets calmer when your inner scoreboard is stronger than your current romantic feedback.
body: An internal standard helps you judge yourself by honesty, restraint, courage, and consistency instead of immediate approval.

hook: Without that internal score, every interaction becomes a referendum you can never quite pass.
